Welcome to the case discussion for 'Discussion on Tuberculosis'. I've analyzed the image and I'm here to assist with the diagnosis. Feel free to ask me specific questions about the findings.
What happened to me ?

To provide an accurate response, I would need more specific details about your symptoms, medical history, and any imaging findings related to your case. However, if this discussion is centered around tuberculosis (TB), common presentations include persistent cough, fever, night sweats, and weight loss. 

If imaging studies, such as a chest X-ray or CT scan, were performed, findings may show pulmonary infiltrates, cavitary lesions, or lymphadenopathy, which are indicative of TB. 

Please share any specific symptoms or imaging results you have, and I can help interpret them further.
